speaker: MATT
raw_text: You've heard tales of something called ball lightning, bits of storm matter that just scatters across. It's usually innocuous and people either watch it fizzle out or get it thrown overboard. It usually happens in the cusp of a storm, and you watch it dance along the vicinity of Yasha. But that's not what you see. I need you to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Are you him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's going to claw across the front of your body.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay, okay, okay, let's go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. That is going to be a 16 to hit. What's your armor class?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 14? Don't you have a shield or something? Jesus.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: She can rage; she doesn't need a shield.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Rage doesn't raise it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As it claws across the front of your body, its hand seems to almost pass through the resistance of the armor for but a minute before you feel this shock to your system as it arcs through; you feel the lightning pulse through your body. You suffer eight points of bludgeoning damage plus five points of lightning damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Would we have seen the lightning hit the ship?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You were below deck, and there--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, I'm upstairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, you're upstairs. You guys watched a bolt of light strike down towards the ship. All you see is this faint, dull glow, like a mote of energy that's rolling around. Make a history check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, 16.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Do you want to roll to get involved? Roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It has to move. Isn't it frightened?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Not anymore. And frightened doesn't force you to move; you just can't get closer.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's your turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That looked like it hurt. Do you want to be healed?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Maybe? A little lower than I thought I would be. Can I try to grapple again and try to get my sword back?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can use an attack to try and disarm it, if you'd like.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I'd like to try and disarm.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, make another athletics check. You have advantage on it, because you're raging.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. It had a plus three and rolled a 13, so 16.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it didn't succeed.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I was like, "How?!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As it pulls back, attempting to use Magician's Judge against you, you reach forward and grab it and, for a moment, you're both struggling back and forth. You manage to rip it from its hand, its fingers actually evaporating as you rip it from its form, and then reform where they were previously. The energy's still arcing around it, and it moves around to almost try and move to your flank, but you shift around to face it. You have your other attack, if you'd like.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yes. Okay. Oh no. (sighs) Forgot to reckless. Can you call out reckless? I'm forgetting everything!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Beforehand, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: You have to call it out beforehand, sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You call it at the beginning of your turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 11 does not hit. Goes wide. Unfortunately your body's still numb from the impact of the lightning bolt. You reel from it angrily. That finishes your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I heal her?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll stick with you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I will not go with Yasha because Sentinel and Sentinel.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'll go with Beau.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How about we four and the outside three?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I could either focus what I'm going to do on one of them, or I could tickle all of them.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All of them at the same time?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It would just get their attention. It would not solve anything.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Wizard's choice. How about just one, and you pick?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Well, I will aim for the one closest. I begin to weave my hands underwater and cast Magic Missile.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will simultaneously fire a crossbow bolt.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Just for fun, I'll add into this with a Sacred Flame.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All towards the same target?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll also send Eldritch Blast.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: See if we can knock one out.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm casting at 2nd-level.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Those that need to roll attacks, roll attacks. Those that need to roll damage, roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Mine is a save against dex of 16.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nope!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Mine is also a save against dex of 15.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: 26 and a 19.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Both hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 12 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 12 to hit? Hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: 21 points of Eldritch Blast.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: 11 points of radiant damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Four beads of energy. Nine-- nein points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Another 20 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, 13, excuse me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This entity, breathing under the water, watches this glimmer of arcane energy. Its attention turns up towards it as it releases the seaweed. Then (multiple explosions), and goes limp under the water as a small cloud of its own blood begins to fill the space around it. At which point, the other four look up and notice your presence from the lights that have been glowing and the death of one of its comrades.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Next target, maybe?
